title: Thai Aubergine Skillet
description: A flavorful Thai-inspired skillet dish featuring aubergine, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: flavorful oil
ingredients.notes: such as peanut or vegetable oil

ingredients.name: skillet seasoning
ingredients.notes: such as Thai red curry powder

instructions: 1. Preheat the skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the flavorful oil and swirl to coat the bottom of the skillet.
3. Add the Canadian garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
4. Add the baby shallots and cook for 2-3 minutes until they start to soften.
5. Add the sliced aubergine and cook for 5-7 minutes until tender.
6. Sprinkle the skillet seasoning and cook for an additional minute.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
